channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah rejects US-backed ceasefire with Israel, calls terms surrender
item.description: Lebanon's Iran-backed group rejected the ceasefire announced by Israel, Lebanon and the US, calling the terms humiliating. The deal would have created security zones excluding Hezbollah fighters from southern Lebanon.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine strikes kill four in occupied Crimea, fuel shortages spread
item.description: Russian-backed officials report four killed in Ukrainian attacks on Simferopol and a commuter train near Kerch. Ukraine's drone campaign has caused fuel rationing across the peninsula, with strikes also hitting near St Petersburg.

item.title: 🇸🇴 Heavy gunfire in Mogadishu as Somalia election dispute escalates
item.description: Government forces and opposition fighters exchanged fire in the capital after the president extended his term by one year. The opposition called the extension unconstitutional and protesters were met with violence.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel approves 2,162 new settlement homes in occupied West Bank
item.description: Far-right Finance Minister Smotrich announced the expansion, saying it would prevent a Palestinian state. The move was condemned by the Palestinian Authority and is illegal under international law.

item.title: 🚀 NASA declares Mars Maven spacecraft dead after six months of silence
item.description: The spacecraft, which studied Mars' atmosphere for over a decade, went silent in December after spinning out of control. Four other orbiters will take over its relay duties for surface rovers.

item.title: 🇫🇷 French jets intercepted Russian aircraft 11 times over week in Baltics
item.description: French fighter jets patrolling Baltic airspace intercepted Russian military aircraft 11 times in one week, reflecting increased Russian air activity near NATO borders.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden urges EU to tighten rules on tourist visas for Russians
item.description: Sweden called on the European Union to restrict tourist visas for Russian citizens, citing ongoing security concerns and the war in Ukraine.

item.title: ⚔️ US House backs resolution curbing Trump's Iran war powers
item.description: The House approved a war powers resolution to limit military action against Iran, a symbolic rebuke to President Trump's handling of the conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China bans four New Zealand lawmakers after Taiwan visit
item.description: Beijing sanctioned four New Zealand MPs for visiting Taiwan, continuing its pressure campaign against countries that engage with the self-governing island.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany puts brave face on UN Security Council defeat
item.description: Germany failed to win a non-permanent seat on the UN Security Council, losing to an unexpected contender in what analysts see as a rebuke of its foreign policy positions.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Bank of Japan expected to raise interest rates in June
item.description: Japan's central bank is preparing to hike borrowing costs as it continues normalizing monetary policy after years of ultra-low rates.

item.title: 💰 US will uphold tariff caps in deals with EU, Japan, says trade chief
item.description: US Trade Representative confirmed Washington would honor tariff limits negotiated with key trading partners amid ongoing trade tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel and Lebanon agree to renew cease-fire, create pilot security zones
item.description: The US announced a ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon, including creation of security zones to exclude Hezbollah fighters from southern Lebanon.

item.title: 💔 11 killed in Gaza strikes in 24 hours as death toll nears 1,000 since cease-fire
item.description: Palestinian health officials reported civilian casualties from Israeli strikes, with the total death toll since the ceasefire approaching 1,000.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia arrests officials in crackdown on corruption
item.description: Indonesian authorities detained multiple government officials in an anti-corruption sweep targeting graft and abuse of power.

item.title: 🏔️ Nepali Mount Everest guide found alive after missing for six days
item.description: A Sherpa guide who disappeared on Everest was discovered crawling toward base camp in what rescuers called a miracle survival.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Council chief calls Western Balkans enlargement most important geopolitical investment
item.description: The European Council President emphasized that bringing Western Balkan countries into the EU remains a top priority for regional stability.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine-Hungary agreement on minorities clears way for EU accession next steps
item.description: Kyiv and Budapest reached a deal on Hungarian minority rights, removing a key obstacle to Ukraine's European Union membership bid.

item.title: 🇬🇱 Greenland is part of Denmark for now, Marco Rubio says
item.description: The US Secretary of State acknowledged Danish sovereignty over Greenland amid ongoing discussions about the Arctic territory's strategic importance.

item.title: 🇧🇳 Brunei's sultan announces cabinet shake-up, appoints sons as ministers
item.description: The Sultan of Brunei reorganized his government and named his sons to ministerial positions in a significant leadership transition.

item.title: 🔍 China accused of spying on Five Eyes nations in major intelligence operation
item.description: British and allied intelligence agencies exposed a Chinese espionage campaign targeting Five Eyes member countries.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden seizes vessel suspected of illegally exporting Ukrainian grain from Russian-occupied territories
item.description: Swedish authorities detained a ship accused of transporting stolen Ukrainian grain from areas under Russian control.

item.title: 🏛️ Ex-Merkel advisor links German support for Israel to failed UN Security Council bid
item.description: A former adviser suggested Germany's strong backing of Israel may have contributed to its defeat in the UN Security Council election.

item.title: 📺 Iran-US war talks show no progress, Israel-Lebanon ceasefire attempt falters
item.description: Negotiations between Iran and the United States have stalled, while a separate ceasefire effort between Israel and Lebanon faces challenges with Hezbollah's rejection.

item.title: 🇬🇧 British MPs react to Brexit anniversary amid calls for EU relationship reset
item.description: As Britain marks another milestone since leaving the EU, politicians debate whether to seek closer ties with Brussels.
